content:
Cross-cultural small talk is a common challenge in global workplaces, where simple conversations often determine first impressions and future opportunities.

## What you'll learn
- Master structured strategies to start and sustain conversations
- Turn small talk into meaningful professional connections
- Practice real-life dialogue through guided role-play

## Who it's for
- Professionals working in multicultural environments
- Learners who feel unsure in informal English conversations
- Anyone looking to improve networking and interpersonal communication skills
title: Small Talk, Big Impact
